roa.docketEntryComment: DEF COUNSEL NOTICE & MOTION TO GRANT PRETRIAL RELEASE FILED AT INSISTENCE
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/NP/X:COURT GRANTS DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S MOTION TODISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TOPENAL CODE 1387(C) FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON(S), DEFENDANT FEDERALLY INDICTED/BE/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE & MOTION TO DETAIN/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL IS DENIED/BAIL:25,000/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT MUST COMPLY WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS SHOULD HE POST BAIL:/DEF:IS ORDERED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE IMMEDIATELY UPON POSTING BAIL,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEFENDANT IS NOTTO CONSUME ANY ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/WEAP/RX/WS/STWPX/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND DA MOTION TO DETAIN/LDPX:09-04-18/ARG&SUB//X:COURT TAKES MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION,/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND RULING ON MOTION TO DETAIN/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL & EXHIBITS IN SUPPORTOF DETENTION MOTION FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:09-04-18/987,2/NB/X:NO BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS SIGNED/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
